scripts.cap:init: npx cap init starflow-3d com.starflow.game --web-dir dist
scripts.cap:sync:release: npm run build:release && npx cap sync && node scripts/setup-release-gradle.mjs
scripts.cap:reset: rm -rf android && npx cap add android && npm run cap:sync
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run cap:sync && npm run android:debug
scripts.android:debug: cd android && chmod +x gradlew && ./gradlew assembleDebug && cd .. && adb install -r android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk
scripts.android:release: npm run cap:sync:release && cd android && chmod +x gradlew && ./gradlew assembleRelease && cd .. && echo 'Release APK: android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk'
